title: Clem Cernosek
compiled_truth: Clem Cernosek is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-14 to 2001-07-10), Clem Cernosek sent 31 and received 290 emails, totalling 321 interactions. Top correspondents: [Daren Farmer](people/daren-farmer) (31), [Edward Terry](people/edward-terry) (12), [Mary Poorman](people/mary-poorman) (11), [Aimee Lannou](people/aimee-lannou) (7), [Pat Clynes](people/pat-clynes) (4).
